zh.Lindley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾林德利
zh.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield於1470年出生在英國。她於大約1487年11月21日與Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年享年95歲。

zh-hans.Sockburn, Durham, England: 英国英格兰達勒姆索可本
zh-hans.Lindley, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾林德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield于1470年出生在英国。她于大约1487年11月21日与Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1565年享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield was born in 1470, in England. She married Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. about 21 November 1487. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1565, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield est née en 1470, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. environ 21 novembre 1487. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1565, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield wurde 1470 in England geboren. Sie hat um 21. November 1487 Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1565 im Alter von 95 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield è nata il nel 1470 nel England. Lei sposato Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. circa 21 novembre 1487. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1565, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfieldは1470年にイギリスで生まれた。約1487年11月21日にChristopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年に95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield(은)는 1470년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1487년 11월 21일 Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield nasceu em 1470, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. aproximadamente 21 de novembro de 1487. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1565, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield родилась в 1470 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. около 21 ноября 1487 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1565 г. в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Anne Markenfield nació en 1470, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. aproximadamente 21 de noviembre de 1487. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1565, a la edad de 95 años.
